name: AI Toolkit — Daily Content & Auto-Post Workflow
description: Runs the Python content generator, appends posts to a Google Sheet, and schedules them to TikTok / Instagram / YouTube Shorts via a social scheduling API.

steps.name: Run AI Content Generator
steps.description: POST to your server or GitHub Actions webhook to execute scripts/content_generator.py

steps.name: Append Rows to Google Sheet
steps.description: Write each generated post row into the 'Content Queue' sheet

steps.name: Schedule TikTok Post
steps.description: Forward caption + scheduled time to your TikTok scheduling integration

steps.name: Schedule Instagram Reel
steps.description: Forward caption + scheduled time to your Instagram scheduling integration

steps.name: Schedule YouTube Short
steps.description: Forward description + scheduled time to your YouTube scheduling integration

environment_variables.GENERATOR_WEBHOOK_URL: URL of the endpoint that runs content_generator.py
environment_variables.GOOGLE_SHEET_ID: ID of the Google Sheet used as the content queue
environment_variables.TIKTOK_SCHEDULE_WEBHOOK: Webhook URL of your TikTok auto-poster
environment_variables.INSTAGRAM_SCHEDULE_WEBHOOK: Webhook URL of your Instagram auto-poster
environment_variables.YOUTUBE_SCHEDULE_WEBHOOK: Webhook URL of your YouTube auto-poster
